shoppinglist.languagePrompt: First, please choose your language and your desired home page to continue with Murmli.
shoppinglist.welcome:
Welcome to Murmli, your smart app for recipes, shopping, and nutrition.

 This app uses AI to facilitate translations, interpretations, and recipe selections. You can even create your own recipes and transfer them directly to the shopping list to make your daily routine more efficient.
shoppinglist.quickGuide:
Simply type what you need into the input field, and Murmli will add it to the shopping list using AI.

 All items are sorted directly by supermarket categories to make them easier to find.

 Once the items are added, you can click on them to find alternatives.
shoppinglist.options: Find more options like sharing or sorting your list in the menu (top right). For example, share the list with your partner to work on it together. You can revoke sharing at any time.

planner.welcome: Specify below for how many people and how many recipes you want to plan. In the text field, you can also enter your wishes in natural language; an AI automatically takes these into account when selecting recipes (e.g., vegetarian for athletes).
planner.options:
Recipes will now be displayed to you. 
Give a thumbs up if you like a recipe, or a thumbs down if you don't. 

The system learns from your decisions to provide better suggestions.
planner.shoppinglist:
Once you have selected the desired number of recipes, you will automatically be taken to the shopping list. This contains all ingredients for the recipes. 

 Under 'Recipes' you will find your selected recipes including instructions. There you can rate the recipes and give feedback.

recipes.overview: Here is the overview of the recipes that belong to your shopping list, your own recipes, and your favorites. You can access them from here.
recipes.create: Click the plus symbol at the top right to create your own recipes. Enter your idea, the AI generates it, and you can even upload a picture of ingredients.
recipes.addToList: If you want to add one of your recipes or favorite recipes to your shopping list, open the recipe and add it via the menu (three dots) at the top right.

tracker.overview:
Simply enter what you've eaten. 

You can describe everything in natural language, such as "a plate of pasta", name explicit products, or provide exact calorie counts – just as you like.
tracker.calorieGoal:
Define your daily calorie goal yourself or have us calculate it automatically. 

Simply enter your body data once – we'll take care of the rest for you.
tracker.activityTracking: Additionally, track your athletic activities, such as "20 minutes of jogging". We automatically calculate how many extra calories you can consume – specifically for you.

setup.aboutApp: This app was developed privately to simplify life with a shopping list and intelligent recipe planning.

helpPage.title: Help & Video Tutorials
helpPage.intro: Here you will find a collection of short videos showing you the most important functions of Murmli. You can watch them in the app at any time, open them on YouTube, or play them enlarged directly in the app.

tips.feedbackPlanner: A recipe from the planner doesn't convince you? Open it and give feedback via the three-dot menu – we'll take care of it.

createRecipeDialog.title: Generate Recipe
createRecipeDialog.text:
Describe your recipe as neutrally as possible: What must be included, what do you want to avoid? The more information you provide, the better we can generate your individual recipe.

After the creation process, it takes about 2–3 minutes for your recipe to appear under 'My Recipes'.

Optionally, you can add a photo – either directly from your gallery or by taking a new picture. This could be a picture of your fridge, individual ingredients, or something that reminds you of your desired recipe.
createRecipeDialog.label: Recipe Description
createRecipeDialog.generatingText: Your recipe is now being created. This can take up to two minutes. You will then find it under 'My Recipes'.

recipes.addIngreditensInfo: Are you sure you want to add the recipe to your current shopping list? All ingredients will be added automatically.
recipes.processingMessage: Your recipe is being created in the background. You will be notified once it's ready.

tracker.askDialog: Here you can ask questions about nutrition. The app will try to answer your question by incorporating your body data and your calorie counter entries from the last 14 days. Please note that the answers are based on the information you have entered in the app.

tracker.refineGroupInfo: Specify what should be changed about this dish (e.g., "less oil", "more protein").

trainingPlans.title: Training Plans

step1.title: Create training plan
step1.content: Training plans can be created individually; you can describe exactly what you want, what you're training for, where, how often a week and how intense/long.

step2.title: Edit training plan
step2.content: If something doesn't fit, you can edit the training plans using natural language. Simply write what should be changed, and you will receive an updated version.

step3.title: Training
step3.content: Training plans are time-based if activated. Active training plans can be trained and logged, set by set – weights, repetitions, or duration. At the end, you have the option to send the training directly to the calorie counter to track burned calories.

trainingPlans.voiceRecordingInfo: Record your description for the training plan. The recording remains stored locally and will only be converted to text after sending. If you do not want to use the recording, you can discard it.
trainingPlans.createPlanInstructions:
Describe your plan as precisely as possible: What do you want to train? How often a week? In what environment? What type of training do you prefer?

You can also specify the intensity: light, moderate, or intense.

Examples:
'I want to go to the gym four times a week, focus on upper body. I am well-trained.'

'I have back pain on the left back of my shoulder. Create a plan for me with targeted exercises for one day a week to improve my posture and relieve the pain.'

The more information you provide, the better your training plan will be created.
trainingPlans.subtitle: Here you can create and manage your training plans.
trainingPlans.confirmDeletePlan: Do you really want to delete this training plan?
trainingPlans.noPlans: You haven't created any training plans yet.
trainingPlans.continuePlanDescription: Create a new plan based on this training plan. You can optionally add wishes.
trainingPlans.enterQuestion: Ask a question about this plan
trainingPlans.askDialog: You can ask questions about this training plan. The last training logs (maximum 10) will be sent along.
trainingPlans.noPlansInfo: No training plans available yet. You can add a new training plan using the plus button at the top right.

activateDialog.title: Activate training plan
activateDialog.msg:
When you start your training plan, the start date is set. You will then see which week of your training plan you are in.
Do you really want to start the training plan?

deleteDialog.title: Delete training plan
deleteDialog.msg: Do you really want to delete this training plan?

finishDialog.title: End training
finishDialog.msg: When you end the training, the start date and all your progress will be reset. Are you sure you want to end the training?

trainingPlans.processingMessage: Your training plan is being created in the background. You will be notified as soon as it's ready.
trainingPlans.readyMessage: Your training plan has been created.

appRating.title: Do you like Murmli?
appRating.description: Murmli is free and open-source. Since I don't have an advertising budget, store reviews help tremendously so that more people can discover the app. If you like the app, I would be very happy about a review!
